best_frontier.title: Search liveness-safe output aliasing from first principles

goal: improve top-line frontier or loop throughput
proposed_capability: create a new generic operator that changes the representation or search neighborhood when recent accepted submissions are dominated by one family
prototype_plan: inspect the best candidate and score buckets
identify the hottest repeated reads or most expensive storage class
construct a small reversible transform or generator that changes that bottleneck
test against semantic verifier before publishing
